examples: Stars Frank Wood, Christina Kirk, Crystal A. Dickinson, Damon Gupton, and Jeremy Shamos.
Scott's school friend Jeff (Jeremy Shamos, superb as always) has been invited and is our guide, playing a stranger navigating long-practiced family rituals.
Enter Lindsey and Steve (Annie Parisse and Jeremy Shamos), a well-heeled young white couple who want to buy the Younger house and turn it into something bigger, fancier and tackier.
